title: chore(skills): apply session learnings to git, agent-loop, security, CLAUDE.md
description: Update four skill files with learnings from production agent orchestration session

title: Audit README.md claims against actual codebase
description: Read README.md and verify: plugin count matches marketplace.json, skill counts per plugin match plugin.json files, installation commands are correct, all referenced paths exist. Flag any discrepancies.

title: Remove superlatives and unsubstantiated claims from README.md
description: Scan README.md for anti-fabrication violations: superlatives (excellent, comprehensive, advanced), unsubstantiated metrics, assumed capabilities. Replace with factual language.

title: Validate README.md examples and commands
description: Test all code examples, installation commands, and mise commands referenced in README.md. Verify they produce expected results.

title: chore(docs): review README.md with anti-fabrication validation
description: Review the project README.md against core:anti-fabrication principles. Verify all claims about skills, plugins, counts, installation commands, and capabilities are accurate. Remove superlatives, validate file paths exist, confirm plugin counts match marketplace.json, and ensure all examples work. Update any stale or fabricated content.

title: Research Elixir style conventions (bang functions, pattern matching)
description: R1: Community style guides, Credo rules, bang function patterns, with/case idioms

title: Research Ecto changeset-as-gatekeeper patterns
description: R2: Ecto schemas as single validation source, embedded schemas for forms, schemaless changesets

title: Research Elixir Port module (hexdocs.pm/elixir/Port.html)
description: T1: Fetch and document Port.open/2, Port.command/3, Port.close/1, Port.connect/2, Port.info/1, Port.monitor/1, all message types

title: Research Erlang port documentation
description: T2: Fetch erlang.org port docs. Extract: port drivers vs external programs, spawn options, packet/line/binary modes, port owner semantics

title: Research Port vs NIF vs C Node vs System.cmd
description: T3: Compare crash isolation, latency, complexity, scheduling impact, security model for each approach

title: feat(elixir): add ports skill for external process communication
description: Research Elixir/Erlang Ports and create a new ports skill for the elixir plugin. Ports are a language construct for communicating with external OS processes. Version-aware: Elixir 1.19.5, Erlang/OTP 28.4.1.
close_reason: Both ports and style skills added to elixir plugin

title: Create standalone tidewave skill
description: Create plugins/languages/elixir/skills/tidewave/SKILL.md covering installation, MCP server config, editor setup, CLI app, security. Register in plugin.json

title: Update tidewave agent to v0.5.6
description: Update MCP tool list if new tools exist, add guidance for v0.5.6 features like extra_apps and log level filtering

title: Research tidewave v0.5.6 changes and CLI app
description: Verify changes between v0.5.5 and v0.5.6, document new features, research tidewave_app CLI capabilities

title: Install bees CLI via mise and initialize bees
description: Add github:ctxshift/bees to mise.toml with platform assets, run mise install, run bees init
close_reason: Bees installed via mise and initialized in .bees/

title: Tidewave skill + bees migration for claude-skills repo
description: Create standalone tidewave skill, update tidewave agent to v0.5.6, migrate repo from beads to bees

title: Update bees SKILL.md CLI command references
description: Verify actual binary name (bees vs bss), update command examples if needed, ensure consistency with mise.toml template

title: Add bees mise tasks to repo mise.toml
description: Copy task definitions from plugins/core/skills/bees/templates/mise.toml, adapt for this repos mise.toml structure
close_reason: Added 17 bees mise task definitions to repo mise.toml

title: Update plugin.json and marketplace.json versions
description: Bump elixir plugin 0.1.3 to 0.1.4, update marketplace.json, bump core plugin if bees skill changes, update all-skills meta-plugin

title: Update phoenix SKILL.md tidewave section
